analysis.consistency: Consistent with typical D&D 5e feature structure and naming conventions for Bard class features.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, concise, and accurately describes the mechanical effect.

mechanics.trigger: Making an ability check that does not already include proficiency bonus.
mechanics.effect: Add half proficiency bonus (rounded down) to the check.
mechanics.balance_consideration: This feature offers broad utility by applying a small, consistent bonus across all skills/abilities where the character is otherwise unskilled. It scales slowly but provides value universally.

analysis.notes: This feature mirrors the 'Jack of All Trades' feature from the Player's Handbook (PHB) for the Bard class.
